steps.title: Find the key contrast
steps.content: The passage notes that Brâncuși heavily influenced both movements yet his exacting standards led him to produce relatively few pieces, setting up a contrast between his impact and his output.

steps.title: Apply the contrast to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B directly links his importance to art history with his limited total output, matching the contrast.
The other choices either introduce unrelated themes, reverse the relationship, or mention diversity not supported.
That matches choice B — B is correct.
